origin_ground_truth.description: String-serialized answer for the original answerable problem. Values are serialized as strings for JSONL and Hugging Face dataset compatibility.

origin_python_solution.description: Executable reference solution for the original problem.

gold_label_solvable.description: Gold answerability label for perturbed contexts; false for all final-release rows.

stage1_pass.description: Whether the instance passed deterministic structural validation during construction.

stage2_final_pass.description: Whether the instance passed semantic non-self majority validation.

stage2_strict_final_pass.description: Whether the instance passed strict semantic validation including category validity.

stage2_eligible_judges.description: Non-self judge family identifiers used during Stage 2 semantic validation.

stage2_judged_count.description: Number of parsed Stage 2 judge outputs.

stage2_unanswerable_pass_votes.description: Number of Stage 2 unanswerability PASS votes.

stage2_strict_pass_votes.description: Number of Stage 2 strict PASS votes.

sampling_seed.description: Fixed seed used for deterministic release sampling.

source_candidate_sample_id.description: Identifier of the sampled pre-repair candidate.

repair_status.description: Human verification and repair status for the final row.

manual_final_repair.description: Whether a final manual repair was applied.
